segments.text: Of course we're tracking the airdodge—dair!
segments.original_text: 回避はもちろん見てます空下

segments.text: Opposite side ledge, one more time!
segments.original_text: 反対側の崖でもう一度

segments.text: Watching that ledge drop from Dain
segments.original_text: 崖離しデインをケアして

segments.text: Delayed it as far as possible, but...
segments.original_text: 最大限まで遅らせましたが

full_text: Of course we're tracking the airdodge—dair! Opposite side ledge, one more time! Watching that ledge drop from Dain Delayed it as far as possible, but...
